//: Renderer tsconfig. DOM + JSX. No node:* modules (renderer is sandboxed; only window.pdfApi crosses the boundary). NOTE: `composite: true` removed in Phase 1.1 (D-1.1) — the renderer config is consumed only by `tsc --noEmit` (typecheck) and by electron-vite (which bundles via Vite, not tsc). Project-reference declaration emit was not in use, but the implied `declaration: true` forced TS to NAME every transitive slice-state type for each `createSelector` export, producing a 74-error TS4023 cascade in document-selectors.ts / annotations-selectors.ts / bookmarks-slice.ts / store.ts. Removing `composite` collapses the cascade (verified Wave 5 / Phase 1.1).
